# function: regqword

Returns a tagged object representing a `REG_QWORD` (64-bit unsigned integer) registry value, for use inside a `regencode` payload.

**Common uses:** large numeric values in registry-driven config — file size limits, byte offsets, or any integer that exceeds `REG_DWORD`'s 32-bit range.

## Example Usage

```terraform
// Tagged 64-bit integer for use inside a regencode payload.
output "max_size" {
  value = provider::burnham::regqword(4294967296)
  // → { __reg_type = "qword", value = "4294967296" }
}
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
regqword(value number) dynamic
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `value` (Number) A 64-bit unsigned integer.
